name: Susan
history: Ongoing interpersonal difficulties involving a partner named Ivan and his family. Recent trust and betrayal issues involving Ivan. Ongoing contact with Ivan's family.
intermediate_belief: I must perform perfectly to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I fail, I will be rejected.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of situations that trigger anxiety, such as leaving meetings.
situation: Discovered that Ivan made travel plans without consulting the patient.
auto_thought: I am going to blow it or I won't have the right answers.
behavior: Leaves the situation to cope with anxiety.
